title: A short-term lender collects online banking credentials in the course of payday loan applications
summary: The Ontario Ministry of Government and Consumer Services alerted the OPC that CashHere, a short-term lender, was requesting clients’ online banking passwords, usernames and security questions and answers in the course of payday loan applications. Our Office subsequently commenced a Commissioner Initiated Investigation into the matter. The...
